expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly lists the required scope areas under “Phase5b checkpoint scope (what must be covered)”: “1. Prompt lifecycle… 2. Template flow… 3. Builder loading… 4. Close or save decision safety”, and includes a coverage table enumerating all four areas.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md repeatedly aligns the output to phase5b: title “Phase5b Shipment Checkpoint”, field “Primary phase under test: phase5b”, section “Phase5b checkpoint scope”, and “Checkpoint enforcement assessment (phase5b)”.
